MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Plaintiff, Siu Ping Lew appeared in pro per and Cary Kletter, Esq. represented Defendant, Arturo Marin. The case settled per written stipulation of parties, not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
